sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75367" key="o)rso/qric" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρσό-θριξ</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τριχος</itype>, <sense id="n75367.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">raising the hair</tr_> (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀρθόθριξ</foreign>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> </bibl> <pb n="1257" TEIform="pb"/> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">97</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
